android.widget.TextView.text: Who remembers these!?! We thought we were all so cool being aloud to have the fruit polos. Haven’t seen them in years, think they are discontinued but certainly got me thinking of sweets that we had growing up!! #Nostalgia #90sNostalgia #Memories #90sWasTheBest
android.widget.TextView.heading: false

android.widget.TextView.text: Derek Jeter must have had that good good cause Mariah writing a whole album about you while she was married was so diabolical 😩🥴 �
android.widget.TextView.heading: false
